---
description: Yami UI Component Library
alwaysApply: true
applyTo: "**"
version: 1.0.0
---

# Yami UI - Component Library

基于 Tailwind CSS v4 的轻量级 CSS 组件库，使用 OKLCH 颜色系统，支持 22 个主题。

```css
@import "@yuelioi/yami";
```

## Components

### accordion
手风琴折叠组件。

[accordion docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/accordion)

**Usage:** 用于展示可折叠内容，适合 FAQ、内容分组等场景。

#### Class Names
- `accordion`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="accordion">
  <details>
    <summary>标题</summary>
    <p>展开的内容</p>
  </details>
</div>
```

---

### alert
提示框/警告条。

[alert docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/alert)

**Usage:** 用于显示操作结果通知、系统警告、信息提示。

#### Class Names
- `alert`
- `alert-title`
- `alert-description`
- `alert-close`
- `alert-info`
- `alert-success`
- `alert-warning`
- `alert-error`
- `alert-outline`
- `alert-soft`
- `alert-solid`
- `alert-borderless`
- `alert-no-icon`
- `alert-sm`
- `alert-lg`
- `alert-enter-from`
- `alert-enter-active`
- `alert-enter-to`
- `alert-leave-from`
- `alert-leave-active`
- `alert-leave-to`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="alert alert-success">
  <span class="alert-title">成功</span>
  <span class="alert-description">操作已完成。</span>
  <button class="alert-close">✕</button>
</div>
```

---

### avatar
用户头像组件。

[avatar docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/avatar)

**Usage:** 常用于个人资料、聊天列表、评论区等用户展示场景。

#### Class Names
- `avatar`
- `avatar-group`
- `avatar-placeholder`
- `pull-up`
- `avatar-online-top`
- `avatar-offline-top`
- `avatar-busy-top`
- `avatar-away-top`
- `avatar-online-bottom`
- `avatar-offline-bottom`
- `avatar-busy-bottom`
- `avatar-away-bottom`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="avatar avatar-online-bottom">
  <img src="/avatar.png" alt="用户" />
</div>

<div class="avatar-group">
  <div class="avatar"><img src="/a.png" /></div>
  <div class="avatar"><img src="/b.png" /></div>
  <div class="avatar avatar-placeholder"><span>+3</span></div>
</div>
```

---

### badge
徽章/标签组件。

[badge docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/badge)

**Usage:** 常见于按钮、图标、标签旁显示数量或状态。

#### Class Names
- `badge`
- `badge-primary`
- `badge-secondary`
- `badge-accent`
- `badge-neutral`
- `badge-info`
- `badge-success`
- `badge-warning`
- `badge-error`
- `badge-soft`
- `badge-outline`
- `badge-ghost`
- `badge-xs`
- `badge-sm`
- `badge-md`
- `badge-lg`
- `badge-xl`
- `badge-pill`
- `badge-square`
- `badge-dot`

#### Syntax
```html
<span class="badge badge-primary">新功能</span>
<span class="badge badge-success badge-outline">已完成</span>
<span class="badge badge-error badge-dot"></span>
```

---

### banner
横幅通知条。

[banner docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/banner)

**Usage:** 用于页面顶部或底部的全局提示，如公告、促销信息。

#### Class Names
- `banner`
- `banner-content`
- `banner-title`
- `banner-description`
- `banner-actions`
- `banner-close`
- `banner-primary`
- `banner-secondary`
- `banner-accent`
- `banner-neutral`
- `banner-info`
- `banner-success`
- `banner-warning`
- `banner-error`
- `banner-top`
- `banner-bottom`
- `banner-no-icon`
- `banner-sm`
- `banner-lg`
- `banner-enter-from`
- `banner-enter-active`
- `banner-enter-to`
- `banner-leave-from`
- `banner-leave-active`
- `banner-leave-to`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="banner banner-info banner-top">
  <div class="banner-content">
    <span class="banner-title">系统通知</span>
    <span class="banner-description">将于今晚 22:00 进行维护。</span>
  </div>
  <div class="banner-actions">
    <button class="banner-close">✕</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### breadcrumbs
面包屑导航。

[breadcrumbs docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/breadcrumbs)

**Usage:** 显示当前页面在网站层级中的位置。

#### Class Names
- `breadcrumbs`
- `breadcrumbs-separator`

#### Syntax
```html
<nav class="breadcrumbs">
  <a href="/">首页</a>
  <span class="breadcrumbs-separator">/</span>
  <a href="/docs">文档</a>
  <span class="breadcrumbs-separator">/</span>
  <span>当前页</span>
</nav>
```

---

### button
按钮组件。

[button docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/button)

**Usage:** 用于触发操作，支持多种颜色、尺寸、风格变体。

#### Class Names
- `btn`
- `btn-active`
- `btn-primary`
- `btn-secondary`
- `btn-accent`
- `btn-neutral`
- `btn-info`
- `btn-success`
- `btn-warning`
- `btn-error`
- `btn-soft`
- `btn-outline`
- `btn-ghost`
- `btn-gradient`
- `btn-xs`
- `btn-sm`
- `btn-md`
- `btn-lg`
- `btn-xl`
- `btn-square`
- `btn-circle`
- `btn-wide`
- `btn-block`

#### Syntax
```html
<button class="btn btn-primary">主要操作</button>
<button class="btn btn-outline btn-secondary">次要操作</button>
<button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">幽灵按钮</button>
<button class="btn btn-circle btn-primary">+</button>
```

---

### card
卡片容器组件。

[card docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/card)

**Usage:** 常用于仪表盘、商品列表、信息展示区。

#### Class Names
- `card`
- `card-title`
- `card-description`
- `card-header`
- `card-body`
- `card-actions`
- `card-footer`
- `card-xs`
- `card-sm`
- `card-md`
- `card-lg`
- `card-xl`
- `card-side`
- `card-alert`
- `card-group`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="card card-md">
  <div class="card-header">
    <h3 class="card-title">卡片标题</h3>
    <p class="card-description">副标题描述</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <p>卡片内容区域</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card-footer">
    <div class="card-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">确认</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### carousel
轮播图组件。

[carousel docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/carousel)

**Usage:** 适用于图片展示、横幅、广告位、产品展示等。

#### Class Names
- `carousel`
- `carousel-track`
- `carousel-item`
- `carousel-caption`
- `carousel-caption-title`
- `carousel-caption-description`
- `carousel-prev`
- `carousel-next`
- `carousel-indicators`
- `carousel-indicator`
- `carousel-xs`
- `carousel-sm`
- `carousel-md`
- `carousel-lg`
- `carousel-xl`
- `carousel-full`
- `carousel-fade`
- `carousel-square`
- `carousel-controls-square`
- `carousel-indicators-square`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="carousel carousel-md">
  <div class="carousel-track">
    <div class="carousel-item"><img src="/1.jpg" /></div>
    <div class="carousel-item"><img src="/2.jpg" /></div>
  </div>
  <button class="carousel-prev">←</button>
  <button class="carousel-next">→</button>
  <div class="carousel-indicators">
    <button class="carousel-indicator"></button>
    <button class="carousel-indicator"></button>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### chat
聊天气泡组件。

[chat docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/chat)

**Usage:** 适用于即时通讯、评论区、客服对话等场景。

#### Class Names
- `chat`
- `chat-start`
- `chat-end`
- `chat-image`
- `chat-header`
- `chat-bubble`
- `chat-footer`
- `chat-bubble-primary`
- `chat-bubble-secondary`
- `chat-bubble-accent`
- `chat-bubble-info`
- `chat-bubble-success`
- `chat-bubble-warning`
- `chat-bubble-error`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="chat chat-start">
  <img src="/avatar.png" class="chat-image" />
  <div>
    <div class="chat-header">Alice</div>
    <div class="chat-bubble">你好！</div>
    <div class="chat-footer">10:23</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="chat chat-end">
  <div>
    <div class="chat-bubble chat-bubble-primary">你好，有什么事吗？</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### checkbox
复选框组件。

[checkbox docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/checkbox)

**Usage:** 用于多项选择场景，支持颜色和尺寸变体。

#### Class Names
- `checkbox`
- `checkbox-primary`
- `checkbox-secondary`
- `checkbox-accent`
- `checkbox-info`
- `checkbox-success`
- `checkbox-warning`
- `checkbox-error`
- `checkbox-xs`
- `checkbox-sm`
- `checkbox-md`
- `checkbox-lg`
- `checkbox-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<input type="checkbox" class="checkbox checkbox-primary" />
<input type="checkbox" class="checkbox checkbox-success checkbox-lg" checked />
```

---

### collapse
折叠面板组件。

[collapse docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/collapse)

**Usage:** 用于收纳内容，减少页面信息密度，支持手风琴效果。

#### Class Names
- `collapse`
- `collapse-title`
- `collapse-content`
- `collapse-arrow`
- `collapse-plus`
- `collapse-open`
- `collapse-close`
- `collapse-primary`
- `collapse-secondary`
- `collapse-accent`
- `collapse-bordered`
- `collapse-shadow`
- `collapse-sm`
- `collapse-lg`
- `collapse-group`
- `collapse-group-compact`
- `collapse-hover`
- `collapse-disabled`

#### Syntax
```html
<details class="collapse collapse-arrow collapse-bordered">
  <summary class="collapse-title">点击展开</summary>
  <div class="collapse-content">这里是展开内容</div>
</details>

<div class="collapse-group">
  <details class="collapse collapse-arrow">
    <summary class="collapse-title">项目一</summary>
    <div class="collapse-content">内容一</div>
  </details>
  <details class="collapse collapse-arrow">
    <summary class="collapse-title">项目二</summary>
    <div class="collapse-content">内容二</div>
  </details>
</div>
```

---

### customOptions
自定义选项卡片（radio/checkbox 美化）。

[customOptions docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/customOptions)

**Usage:** 将 radio/checkbox 渲染为可选卡片，用于计划选择、配置选项等。

#### Class Names
- `custom-option`
- `custom-soft-option`

#### Syntax
```html
<label class="custom-option">
  <input type="radio" name="plan" value="free" />
  <span>免费版</span>
</label>
<label class="custom-option">
  <input type="radio" name="plan" value="pro" />
  <span>专业版</span>
</label>
```

---

### diff
图片对比滑块。

[diff docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/diff)

**Usage:** 用于展示前后对比效果，如图片处理前后、设计稿对比。

#### Class Names
- `diff`
- `diff-resizer`
- `diff-item-1`
- `diff-item-2`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="diff">
  <div class="diff-item-1"><img src="/before.jpg" /></div>
  <div class="diff-item-2"><img src="/after.jpg" /></div>
  <div class="diff-resizer"></div>
</div>
```

---

### divider
分割线组件。

[divider docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/divider)

**Usage:** 用于分隔内容区块，支持带文字的分割线。

#### Class Names
- `divider`
- `divider-horizontal`
- `divider-vertical`
- `divider-neutral`
- `divider-primary`
- `divider-secondary`
- `divider-accent`
- `divider-success`
- `divider-warning`
- `divider-info`
- `divider-error`
- `divider-dotted`
- `divider-dashed`
- `divider-start`
- `divider-end`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="divider">或者</div>
<div class="divider divider-primary divider-dashed"></div>
<div class="divider divider-vertical h-16"></div>
```

---

### dock
底部浮动任务栏。

[dock docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/dock)

**Usage:** 移动端 Tab Bar，固定在页面底部的导航区域。

#### Class Names
- `dock`
- `dock-label`
- `dock-active`
- `dock-xs`
- `dock-sm`
- `dock-md`
- `dock-lg`
- `dock-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="dock">
  <button class="dock-active">
    🏠
    <span class="dock-label">首页</span>
  </button>
  <button>
    🔍
    <span class="dock-label">搜索</span>
  </button>
  <button>
    👤
    <span class="dock-label">我的</span>
  </button>
</div>
```

---

### drawer
侧边抽屉组件。

[drawer docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/drawer)

**Usage:** 移动端侧边菜单，桌面端辅助面板。

#### Class Names
- `drawer`
- `drawer-content`
- `drawer-side`
- `drawer-toggle`
- `drawer-button`
- `drawer-overlay`
- `drawer-end`
- `drawer-open`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="drawer">
  <input id="my-drawer" type="checkbox" class="drawer-toggle" />
  <div class="drawer-content">
    <label for="my-drawer" class="btn drawer-button">打开抽屉</label>
  </div>
  <div class="drawer-side">
    <label for="my-drawer" class="drawer-overlay"></label>
    <ul class="menu bg-base-200 min-h-full w-80 p-4">
      <li><a>菜单项</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### dropdown
下拉菜单组件。

[dropdown docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/dropdown)

**Usage:** 按钮菜单、导航下拉、筛选项等场景。

#### Class Names
- `dropdown`
- `dropdown-content`
- `dropdown-bottom`
- `dropdown-top`
- `dropdown-start`
- `dropdown-end`
- `dropdown-center`
- `dropdown-xs`
- `dropdown-sm`
- `dropdown-md`
- `dropdown-lg`
- `dropdown-xl`
- `dropdown-arrow`
- `dropdown-arrow-up`
- `dropdown-arrow-down`
- `dropdown-hover`
- `dropdown-fixed`
- `dropdown-fit`
- `dropdown-wide`

#### Syntax
```html
<!-- CSS-only（details/summary） -->
<details class="dropdown">
  <summary class="btn btn-primary">打开菜单</summary>
  <ul class="dropdown-content dropdown-bottom menu p-2 shadow bg-base-100 rounded-box">
    <li><a>选项一</a></li>
    <li><a>选项二</a></li>
  </ul>
</details>

<!-- JS 插件方式 -->
<button data-dropdown-toggle="my-dropdown" class="btn">菜单</button>
<ul id="my-dropdown" class="dropdown-content" hidden>
  <li><a>选项一</a></li>
</ul>
```

---

### fab
浮动操作按钮。

[fab docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/fab)

**Usage:** 在界面右下角展示主操作，如"新建"、"添加"，支持展开子按钮。

#### Class Names
- `fab`
- `fab-flower`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="fab">
  <button class="btn btn-primary rounded-full size-14 shadow-lg">+</button>
  <!-- fab-flower：鼠标悬停展开子按钮 -->
  <button class="btn btn-secondary rounded-full size-12">✏</button>
  <button class="btn btn-error rounded-full size-12">🗑</button>
</div>
```

---

### fieldset
表单字段分组。

[fieldset docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/fieldset)

**Usage:** 将相关表单字段组织在一起，添加标题和描述。

#### Class Names
- `fieldset`
- `fieldset-legend`
- `fieldset-description`
- `fieldset-content`
- `fieldset-item`
- `fieldset-divider`
- `fieldset-disabled`
- `fieldset-error`
- `fieldset-success`
- `fieldset-info`
- `fieldset-warning`
- `fieldset-danger`
- `fieldset-sm`
- `fieldset-lg`
- `fieldset-borderless`
- `fieldset-ghost`
- `fieldset-shadow`
- `fieldset-row`
- `fieldset-columns-2`
- `fieldset-columns-3`
- `fieldset-columns-auto`
- `fieldset-group`
- `fieldset-group-compact`
- `fieldset-collapsible`
- `fieldset-required`
- `fieldset-optional`
- `fieldset-step`

#### Syntax
```html
<fieldset class="fieldset">
  <legend class="fieldset-legend">个人信息</legend>
  <p class="fieldset-description">请填写基本资料</p>
  <div class="fieldset-content space-y-3">
    <input type="text" class="input w-full" placeholder="姓名" />
    <input type="email" class="input w-full" placeholder="邮箱" />
  </div>
</fieldset>
```

---

### file
文件上传输入框。

[file docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/file)

**Usage:** 文件选择上传场景。

#### Class Names
- `input-file`
- `input-file-xs`
- `input-file-sm`
- `input-file-md`
- `input-file-lg`
- `input-file-xl`
- `input-file-floating`

#### Syntax
```html
<input type="file" class="input-file input-file-md" />
```

---

### filter
筛选条组件。

[filter docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/filter)

**Usage:** 内容列表的状态/类型筛选。

#### Class Names
- `filter`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="filter">
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <div class="filter-item" data-active="true">全部</div>
    <div class="filter-item">待处理</div>
    <div class="filter-item">已完成</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### footer
页脚区域组件。

[footer docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/footer)

**Usage:** 网站底部信息区，包含链接、版权、社交媒体等。

#### Class Names
- `footer`
- `footer-section`
- `footer-title`
- `footer-link`
- `footer-logo`
- `footer-description`
- `footer-divider`
- `footer-bottom`
- `footer-social`
- `footer-social-btn`
- `footer-center`
- `footer-bordered`
- `footer-dark`

#### Syntax
```html
<footer class="footer footer-bordered">
  <div class="footer-section">
    <span class="footer-logo">Logo</span>
    <p class="footer-description">公司简介</p>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-section">
    <span class="footer-title">产品</span>
    <a class="footer-link" href="#">功能</a>
    <a class="footer-link" href="#">定价</a>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">© 2025 公司名</div>
</footer>
```

---

### hover-card
鼠标悬停弹出卡片。

[hover-card docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/hover-card)

**Usage:** 鼠标悬停时显示额外信息，如用户资料卡片、产品预览。

#### Class Names
- `hover-card`
- `hover-card-trigger`
- `hover-card-content`
- `hover-card-top`
- `hover-card-start`
- `hover-card-end`
- `hover-card-sm`
- `hover-card-lg`
- `hover-card-bordered`
- `hover-card-glass`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="hover-card">
  <button class="hover-card-trigger btn">悬停查看</button>
  <div class="hover-card-content">
    <p>这是悬停卡片内容</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### indicator
角标定位组件。

[indicator docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/indicator)

**Usage:** 在目标元素上叠加角标，如消息数量、状态标记。

#### Class Names
- `indicator`
- `indicator-item`
- `indicator-start`
- `indicator-center`
- `indicator-end`
- `indicator-top`
- `indicator-middle`
- `indicator-bottom`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="indicator">
  <span class="indicator-item badge badge-error">99+</span>
  <button class="btn">通知</button>
</div>
```

---

### input
文本输入框组件。

[input docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/input)

**Usage:** 通用文本输入，支持带图标、浮动标签等变体。

#### Class Names
- `input`
- `no-focus`
- `input-neutral`
- `input-primary`
- `input-secondary`
- `input-accent`
- `input-info`
- `input-success`
- `input-warning`
- `input-error`
- `input-ghost`
- `input-xs`
- `input-sm`
- `input-md`
- `input-lg`
- `input-xl`
- `input-floating`
- `input-floating-label`

#### Syntax
```html
<!-- 普通输入框 -->
<input type="text" class="input input-primary" placeholder="请输入..." />

<!-- 带图标（label 包裹） -->
<label class="input input-md">
  <span>🔍</span>
  <input type="text" placeholder="搜索..." />
</label>

<!-- 浮动标签 -->
<label class="input-floating">
  <input type="text" class="input" placeholder=" " />
  <span class="input-floating-label">用户名</span>
</label>
```

---

### kbd
键盘按键样式。

[kbd docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/kbd)

**Usage:** 展示键盘快捷键说明。

#### Class Names
- `kbd`
- `kbd-xs`
- `kbd-sm`
- `kbd-md`
- `kbd-lg`
- `kbd-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
按 <kbd class="kbd kbd-sm">Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd class="kbd kbd-sm">C</kbd> 复制
```

---

### label
表单标签与辅助文字。

[label docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/label)

**Usage:** 表单字段的标签、帮助文本、验证消息。

#### Class Names
- `label-text`
- `helper-text`
- `success-message`
- `error-message`

#### Syntax
```html
<label>
  <span class="label-text">用户名</span>
  <input type="text" class="input" />
  <span class="helper-text">6-20 个字符</span>
  <span class="error-message">该用户名已被占用</span>
</label>
```

---

### link
链接样式组件。

[link docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/link)

**Usage:** 为链接添加颜色、下划线动画等样式。

#### Class Names
- `link`
- `link-hover`
- `link-animated`
- `link-primary`
- `link-secondary`
- `link-accent`
- `link-neutral`
- `link-success`
- `link-info`
- `link-warning`
- `link-error`

#### Syntax
```html
<a href="#" class="link link-primary">查看详情</a>
<a href="#" class="link link-animated link-accent">动画下划线链接</a>
```

---

### list / list-group
列表组件。

[list docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/list)

**Usage:** 带交互的列表项，常用于设置菜单、文件列表、联系人列表。

#### Class Names
- `list-group`
- `list-group-item`
- `list-group-item-action`
- `list-group-item-end`
- `list-group-item-desc`
- `list-group-primary`
- `list-group-secondary`
- `list-group-accent`
- `list-group-success`
- `list-group-warning`
- `list-group-error`
- `list-group-borderless`
- `list-group-flush`
- `list-group-divided`
- `list-group-sm`
- `list-group-lg`

#### Syntax
```html
<ul class="list-group list-group-divided">
  <li class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
    <span>列表项一</span>
    <span class="list-group-item-end">→</span>
  </li>
  <li class="list-group-item list-group-item-action">
    <span>列表项二</span>
    <span class="list-group-item-desc">描述文字</span>
  </li>
</ul>
```

---

### loading
加载动画组件。

[loading docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/loading)

**Usage:** 用于异步操作的加载状态展示。

#### Class Names
- `loading`
- `loading-spinner`
- `loading-dots`
- `loading-ring`
- `loading-ball`
- `loading-bars`
- `loading-infinity`
- `loading-xs`
- `loading-sm`
- `loading-md`
- `loading-lg`
- `loading-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<span class="loading loading-spinner loading-md"></span>
<span class="loading loading-dots loading-lg text-primary"></span>
```

---

### mask
图片遮罩形状组件。

[mask docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/mask)

**Usage:** 将图片裁剪为特定形状，如六边形、心形、星形等。

#### Class Names
- `mask`
- `mask-half-1`
- `mask-half-2`
- `mask-squircle`
- `mask-decagon`
- `mask-diamond`
- `mask-heart`
- `mask-hexagon`
- `mask-hexagon-2`
- `mask-circle`
- `mask-parallelogram`
- `mask-parallelogram-2`
- `mask-parallelogram-3`
- `mask-parallelogram-4`
- `mask-pentagon`
- `mask-square`
- `mask-star`
- `mask-star-2`
- `mask-triangle`
- `mask-triangle-2`
- `mask-triangle-3`
- `mask-triangle-4`

#### Syntax
```html
<img src="/avatar.jpg" class="mask mask-hexagon w-24" />
<img src="/photo.jpg" class="mask mask-heart w-32" />
```

---

### mega-menu
超级下拉菜单（多列导航）。

[mega-menu docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/mega-menu)

**Usage:** 适合内容分类多的网站导航，支持多列布局和图文混排。

#### Class Names
- `mega-menu-nav`
- `mega-menu-brand`
- `mega-menu-list`
- `mega-menu-link`
- `mega-menu-actions`
- `mega-menu-dropdown`
- `mega-menu-cols-2`
- `mega-menu-cols-3`
- `mega-menu-cols-4`
- `mega-menu-section`
- `mega-menu-section-title`
- `mega-menu-item`
- `mega-menu-item-icon`
- `mega-menu-item-body`
- `mega-menu-item-title`
- `mega-menu-item-desc`
- `mega-menu-footer`
- `mega-menu-card`
- `mega-menu-card-title`
- `mega-menu-card-desc`
- `mega-menu-divider`

#### Syntax
```html
<nav class="mega-menu-nav">
  <a class="mega-menu-brand" href="/">Logo</a>
  <ul class="mega-menu-list">
    <li>
      <a class="mega-menu-link" href="#">产品 ▾</a>
      <div class="mega-menu-dropdown mega-menu-cols-2">
        <div class="mega-menu-section">
          <h4 class="mega-menu-section-title">功能</h4>
          <a class="mega-menu-item" href="#">
            <span class="mega-menu-item-icon">⚡</span>
            <div class="mega-menu-item-body">
              <div class="mega-menu-item-title">自动化</div>
              <div class="mega-menu-item-desc">一键自动化工作流</div>
            </div>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </li>
  </ul>
</nav>
```

---

### menu
导航菜单组件。

[menu docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/menu)

**Usage:** 垂直/水平导航菜单，支持分组标题和禁用状态。

#### Class Names
- `menu`
- `menu-title`
- `menu-horizontal`
- `menu-vertical`
- `menu-xs`
- `menu-sm`
- `menu-md`
- `menu-lg`
- `menu-xl`
- `menu-active`
- `menu-disabled`

#### Syntax
```html
<ul class="menu menu-vertical bg-base-200 rounded-box w-56">
  <li class="menu-title">导航</li>
  <li><a class="menu-active">首页</a></li>
  <li><a>关于</a></li>
  <li><a class="menu-disabled">禁用</a></li>
</ul>
```

---

### modal
模态对话框组件。

[modal docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/modal)

**Usage:** 在需要用户确认、输入或展示重要信息的场景中使用。

#### Class Names
- `modal`
- `modal-content`
- `modal-content-sm`
- `modal-content-md`
- `modal-content-lg`
- `modal-content-xl`
- `modal-content-full`
- `modal-header`
- `modal-title`
- `modal-close`
- `modal-body`
- `modal-footer`
- `modal-bounce`
- `modal-blur`

#### Syntax
```html
<button class="btn" onclick="document.getElementById('modal1').showModal()">打开</button>

<dialog id="modal1" class="modal">
  <div class="modal-content modal-content-md">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h3 class="modal-title">标题</h3>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('modal1').close()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <p>这是对话框内容</p>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-primary">确认</button>
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="document.getElementById('modal1').close()">取消</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</dialog>
```

#### Rules
- 使用原生 `<dialog>` 元素，通过 `.showModal()` 打开
- JS 插件：`import { Modal, initModals } from "@yuelioi/yami/plugins/modal"`
- 支持 `data-modal-toggle="modal-id"` 触发，`data-modal-close` 关闭

---

### mockup
原型展示组件。

[mockup docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/mockup)

**Usage:** 展示代码块、浏览器窗口、手机屏幕等原型效果。

#### Class Names
- `mockup-code`
- `mockup-window`
- `mockup-browser`
- `mockup-browser-toolbar`
- `mockup-phone`
- `mockup-phone-camera`
- `mockup-phone-display`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="mockup-code">
  <pre><code>npm install @yuelioi/yami</code></pre>
</div>

<div class="mockup-browser">
  <div class="mockup-browser-toolbar">https://example.com</div>
  <div class="p-4">页面内容</div>
</div>

<div class="mockup-phone">
  <div class="mockup-phone-camera"></div>
  <div class="mockup-phone-display"><p>手机屏幕内容</p></div>
</div>
```

---

### navbar
顶部导航栏组件。

[navbar docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/navbar)

**Usage:** 网站顶部导航，支持固定、毛玻璃、反色等风格。

#### Class Names
- `navbar`
- `navbar-start`
- `navbar-center`
- `navbar-end`
- `navbar-brand`
- `navbar-link`
- `navbar-divider`
- `navbar-toggle`
- `navbar-menu`
- `navbar-bordered`
- `navbar-sticky`
- `navbar-shadow`
- `navbar-glass`
- `navbar-invert`
- `navbar-transparent`

#### Syntax
```html
<nav class="navbar navbar-sticky navbar-shadow">
  <div class="navbar-start">
    <a class="navbar-brand" href="/">品牌</a>
  </div>
  <div class="navbar-center">
    <a class="navbar-link navbar-link-active" href="/">首页</a>
    <a class="navbar-link" href="/docs">文档</a>
    <div class="navbar-divider"></div>
    <a class="navbar-link" href="/blog">博客</a>
  </div>
  <div class="navbar-end">
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">登录</button>
  </div>
</nav>
```

---

### number
数字增减输入框。

[number docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/number)

**Usage:** 需要精确数字输入且有范围限制的场景，如数量、价格。

#### Class Names
- `number-input`
- `number-input-decrement`
- `number-input-increment`
- `number-input-field`
- `number-input-primary`
- `number-input-success`
- `number-input-warning`
- `number-input-error`
- `number-input-ghost`
- `number-input-xs`
- `number-input-sm`
- `number-input-lg`
- `number-input-xl`
- `number-input-vertical`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="number-input number-input-primary">
  <button class="number-input-decrement">−</button>
  <input type="number" class="number-input-field" value="1" min="0" />
  <button class="number-input-increment">+</button>
</div>
```

---

### pagination
分页器组件。

[pagination docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/pagination)

**Usage:** 长列表、搜索结果、文章列表的分页导航。

#### Class Names
- `pagination`
- `pagination-item`
- `pagination-ellipsis`
- `pagination-prev`
- `pagination-next`
- `pagination-primary`
- `pagination-secondary`
- `pagination-accent`
- `pagination-neutral`
- `pagination-xs`
- `pagination-sm`
- `pagination-md`
- `pagination-lg`
- `pagination-bordered`
- `pagination-pill`
- `pagination-square`

#### Syntax
```html
<nav class="pagination pagination-primary pagination-md">
  <button class="pagination-prev">«</button>
  <button class="pagination-item">1</button>
  <button class="pagination-item pagination-item-active">2</button>
  <button class="pagination-item">3</button>
  <span class="pagination-ellipsis">…</span>
  <button class="pagination-item">10</button>
  <button class="pagination-next">»</button>
</nav>
```

---

### pinInput
PIN 码输入框。

[pinInput docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/pinInput)

**Usage:** 验证码输入、PIN 码、OTP 确认场景。

#### Class Names
- `pin-input`
- `pin-input-underline`
- `pin-input-xs`
- `pin-input-sm`
- `pin-input-md`
- `pin-input-lg`
- `pin-input-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="pin-input pin-input-md">
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" />
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" />
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" />
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" inputmode="numeric" />
</div>
```

---

### popover
弹出提示框组件。

[popover docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/popover)

**Usage:** 比 tooltip 更丰富的悬浮内容，如操作菜单、详细说明。

#### Class Names
- `popover`
- `popover-title`
- `popover-body`
- `popover-footer`
- `popover-arrow`
- `popover-dark`
- `popover-no-arrow`
- `popover-compact`
- `popover-sm`
- `popover-lg`
- `popover-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<button data-popover-toggle="pop1" class="btn">查看</button>
<div id="pop1" class="popover" hidden>
  <div class="popover-title">提示标题</div>
  <div class="popover-body">这里是更详细的内容。</div>
  <div class="popover-arrow"></div>
</div>
```

#### Rules
- JS 插件：`import { Popover, initPopovers } from "@yuelioi/yami/plugins/popover"`
- 支持 12 个方位（placement）、click/hover/focus 触发方式

---

### progress
进度条组件。

[progress docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/progress)

**Usage:** 文件上传、任务完成度、步骤进度展示。

#### Class Names
- `progress`
- `progress-label`
- `progress-bar`
- `progress-horizontal`
- `progress-vertical`
- `progress-striped`
- `progress-animated`
- `progress-indeterminate`
- `progress-step`
- `progress-primary`
- `progress-secondary`
- `progress-accent`
- `progress-info`
- `progress-success`
- `progress-warning`
- `progress-error`

#### Syntax
```html
<!-- 原生 -->
<progress class="progress progress-primary" value="70" max="100"></progress>

<!-- 自定义 -->
<div class="progress progress-success">
  <div class="progress-bar" style="width: 60%">
    <span class="progress-label">60%</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 不确定进度 -->
<div class="progress progress-indeterminate progress-primary"></div>
```

---

### radio
单选框组件。

[radio docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/radio)

**Usage:** 从多个选项中单选，支持颜色和尺寸变体。

#### Class Names
- `radio`
- `radio-inset`
- `radio-primary`
- `radio-secondary`
- `radio-accent`
- `radio-info`
- `radio-success`
- `radio-warning`
- `radio-error`
- `radio-xs`
- `radio-sm`
- `radio-md`
- `radio-lg`
- `radio-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<input type="radio" name="opt" class="radio radio-primary" />
<input type="radio" name="opt" class="radio radio-primary" checked />
```

---

### radialprogress
圆形进度条。

[radialprogress docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/radialprogress)

**Usage:** 展示百分比、得分、圆形进度，常用于仪表盘。

#### Class Names
- `radial-progress`
- `radial-progress-xs`
- `radial-progress-sm`
- `radial-progress-md`
- `radial-progress-lg`
- `radial-progress-xl`
- `radial-progress-primary`
- `radial-progress-secondary`
- `radial-progress-accent`
- `radial-progress-info`
- `radial-progress-success`
- `radial-progress-warning`
- `radial-progress-error`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="radial-progress radial-progress-primary" style="--value: 75; --size: 6rem">
  75%
</div>
```

---

### range
范围滑块组件。

[range docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/range)

**Usage:** 音量调节、价格区间、亮度调整等滑块场景。

#### Class Names
- `range`
- `range-primary`
- `range-secondary`
- `range-accent`
- `range-neutral`
- `range-success`
- `range-warning`
- `range-info`
- `range-error`
- `range-xs`
- `range-sm`
- `range-md`
- `range-lg`
- `range-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<input type="range" class="range range-primary" min="0" max="100" value="40" />
```

---

### rating
评分组件。

[rating docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/rating)

**Usage:** 商品评分、服务满意度、内容质量评价。

#### Class Names
- `rating`
- `rating-xs`
- `rating-sm`
- `rating-md`
- `rating-lg`
- `rating-xl`
- `rating-heart`
- `rating-half`
- `rating-readonly`
- `rating-hidden`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="rating rating-md">
  <input type="radio" name="rate" class="rating-hidden" />
  <input type="radio" name="rate" />
  <input type="radio" name="rate" />
  <input type="radio" name="rate" checked />
  <input type="radio" name="rate" />
  <input type="radio" name="rate" />
</div>
```

---

### select
下拉选择框组件。

[select docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/select)

**Usage:** 从较多选项中选择一项，支持浮动标签。

#### Class Names
- `select`
- `select-xs`
- `select-sm`
- `select-md`
- `select-lg`
- `select-xl`
- `select-floating`
- `select-floating-label`

#### Syntax
```html
<select class="select select-md">
  <option disabled selected>请选择</option>
  <option>选项一</option>
  <option>选项二</option>
</select>
```

---

### select-checkbox
多选下拉框组件。

[select-checkbox docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/select-checkbox)

**Usage:** 需要多选的筛选场景，如标签选择、权限分配。

#### Class Names
- `select-checkbox`
- `select-checkbox-item`
- `select-checkbox-primary`
- `select-checkbox-secondary`
- `select-checkbox-accent`
- `select-checkbox-sm`
- `select-checkbox-lg`
- `select-checkbox-ghost`
- `select-checkbox-bordered`
- `select-checkbox-borderless`
- `select-checkbox-group`
- `select-checkbox-group-title`
- `select-checkbox-with-all`
- `select-checkbox-tags`
- `select-checkbox-empty`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="select-checkbox select-checkbox-primary">
  <label class="select-checkbox-item">
    <input type="checkbox" /> <span>选项 A</span>
  </label>
  <label class="select-checkbox-item">
    <input type="checkbox" /> <span>选项 B</span>
  </label>
</div>
```

---

### sidebar
侧边栏导航组件。

[sidebar docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/sidebar)

**Usage:** 应用后台的主导航，支持折叠、子菜单、角标。

#### Class Names
- `sidebar`
- `sidebar-header`
- `sidebar-header-brand`
- `sidebar-toggle-btn`
- `sidebar-search`
- `sidebar-content`
- `sidebar-section`
- `sidebar-group-title`
- `sidebar-divider`
- `sidebar-item`
- `sidebar-icon`
- `sidebar-label`
- `sidebar-badge`
- `sidebar-chevron`
- `sidebar-submenu`
- `sidebar-submenu-list`
- `sidebar-subitem`
- `sidebar-footer`
- `sidebar-user`
- `sidebar-footer-text`
- `sidebar-bordered`
- `sidebar-dark`
- `sidebar-primary`
- `sidebar-secondary`
- `sidebar-accent`

#### Syntax
```html
<aside class="sidebar sidebar-bordered">
  <div class="sidebar-header">
    <a class="sidebar-header-brand" href="/">Logo</a>
    <button class="sidebar-toggle-btn">☰</button>
  </div>
  <div class="sidebar-content">
    <nav class="sidebar-section">
      <span class="sidebar-group-title">主导航</span>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="/">
        <span class="sidebar-icon">🏠</span>
        <span class="sidebar-label">首页</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="/docs">
        <span class="sidebar-icon">📄</span>
        <span class="sidebar-label">文档</span>
        <span class="sidebar-badge badge badge-primary">新</span>
      </a>
    </nav>
  </div>
  <div class="sidebar-footer">
    <div class="sidebar-user">
      <img src="/avatar.png" class="avatar" />
      <span class="sidebar-footer-text">用户名</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</aside>
```

#### Rules
- JS 插件：`import { Sidebar, initSidebars } from "@yuelioi/yami/plugins/sidebar"`
- 支持 `data-sidebar-toggle` 折叠，`data-sidebar-submenu` 子菜单

---

### skeleton
骨架屏加载占位符。

[skeleton docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/skeleton)

**Usage:** 内容加载中时的占位动画，提升感知性能。

#### Class Names
- `skeleton`
- `skeleton-circle`
- `skeleton-square`
- `skeleton-box`
- `skeleton-text`
- `skeleton-heading`
- `skeleton-btn`
- `skeleton-pulse`
- `skeleton-static`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="flex gap-3 items-center">
  <div class="skeleton skeleton-circle w-12 h-12"></div>
  <div class="space-y-2">
    <div class="skeleton skeleton-heading w-32 h-5"></div>
    <div class="skeleton skeleton-text w-48 h-4"></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### stat
统计数据展示组件。

[stat docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/stat)

**Usage:** 仪表盘的核心指标展示，如用户数、收入、增长率。

#### Class Names
- `stats`
- `stats-border`
- `stat`
- `stat-figure`
- `stat-title`
- `stat-value`
- `stat-desc`
- `stat-actions`
- `stats-horizontal`
- `stats-vertical`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="stats stats-border">
  <div class="stat">
    <div class="stat-figure text-primary">📊</div>
    <div class="stat-title">总用户</div>
    <div class="stat-value text-primary">31K</div>
    <div class="stat-desc">较上月 +21%</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat">
    <div class="stat-title">收入</div>
    <div class="stat-value">$4,200</div>
    <div class="stat-desc">本月</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### status
状态指示点。

[status docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/status)

**Usage:** 表示在线/离线/繁忙等实时状态。

#### Class Names
- `status`
- `status-primary`
- `status-secondary`
- `status-accent`
- `status-info`
- `status-success`
- `status-warning`
- `status-error`
- `status-xs`
- `status-sm`
- `status-md`
- `status-lg`
- `status-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<span class="status status-success status-md"></span>
<span class="status status-error status-lg"></span>
```

---

### swap
内容切换组件（复选框驱动）。

[swap docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/swap)

**Usage:** 主题切换图标、收藏按钮、开关图标等二态切换。

#### Class Names
- `swap`
- `swap-active`
- `swap-rotate`
- `swap-flip`

#### Syntax
```html
<label class="swap swap-rotate">
  <input type="checkbox" />
  <div class="swap-on">🌙</div>
  <div class="swap-off">☀️</div>
</label>
```

---

### switches
开关组件。

[switches docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/switches)

**Usage:** 设置页面的开关选项，如通知开关、功能启用等。

#### Class Names
- `switch`
- `switch-outline`
- `switch-primary`
- `switch-secondary`
- `switch-accent`
- `switch-success`
- `switch-warning`
- `switch-info`
- `switch-error`
- `switch-xs`
- `switch-sm`
- `switch-md`
- `switch-lg`
- `switch-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<input type="checkbox" class="switch switch-primary" />
<input type="checkbox" class="switch switch-success switch-lg" checked />
```

---

### tab
标签页/选项卡组件。

[tab docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/tab)

**Usage:** 内容分组切换，适合设置页、多视图切换场景。

#### Class Names
- `tabs`
- `tab`
- `tab-content`
- `tab-header`
- `tab-body`
- `tabs-line`
- `tabs-boxed`
- `tabs-pill`
- `tabs-soft`
- `tabs-primary`
- `tabs-secondary`
- `tabs-accent`
- `tabs-neutral`
- `tabs-success`
- `tabs-warning`
- `tabs-error`
- `tabs-sm`
- `tabs-md`
- `tabs-lg`
- `tabs-xl`
- `tabs-stretch`
- `tab-disabled`

#### Syntax
```html
<!-- 并列结构（radio + label + content 同级） -->
<div class="tabs tabs-boxed tabs-primary">
  <input type="radio" name="my-tabs" id="tab1" checked />
  <label class="tab" for="tab1">标签一</label>
  <div class="tab-content p-4">标签一的内容</div>

  <input type="radio" name="my-tabs" id="tab2" />
  <label class="tab" for="tab2">标签二</label>
  <div class="tab-content p-4">标签二的内容</div>
</div>

<!-- 分离结构（tab-header + tab-body） -->
<div class="tabs tabs-line">
  <div class="tab-header">
    <input type="radio" name="tabs2" id="t1" checked />
    <label class="tab" for="t1">首页</label>
    <input type="radio" name="tabs2" id="t2" />
    <label class="tab" for="t2">设置</label>
  </div>
  <div class="tab-body">
    <div class="tab-content p-4">首页内容</div>
    <div class="tab-content p-4">设置内容</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### table
表格组件。

[table docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/table)

**Usage:** 数据列表展示，支持行 hover、条纹、排序等效果。

#### Class Names
- `table`
- `table-wrap`
- `table-row-hover`
- `table-row-active`
- `table-row-stripe`
- `table-row-success`
- `table-row-warning`
- `table-row-error`
- `table-row-info`
- `table-col-center`
- `table-col-right`
- `table-col-nowrap`
- `table-col-fixed`
- `table-clean`
- `table-bordered`
- `table-borderless`
- `table-sm`
- `table-lg`
- `table-sort`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="table-wrap">
  <table class="table table-bordered table-row-hover">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>姓名</th>
        <th>职位</th>
        <th class="table-col-right">操作</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>张三</td>
        <td>前端工程师</td>
        <td class="table-col-right">
          <button class="btn btn-xs btn-ghost">编辑</button>
        </td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

---

### textarea
多行文本输入框。

[textarea docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/textarea)

**Usage:** 评论、描述、长文本输入场景。

#### Class Names
- `textarea`
- `textarea-floating`
- `textarea-floating-label`
- `textarea-xs`
- `textarea-sm`
- `textarea-md`
- `textarea-lg`
- `textarea-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<textarea class="textarea textarea-md" placeholder="请输入内容..."></textarea>
```

---

### timeline
时间轴组件。

[timeline docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/timeline)

**Usage:** 展示历史事件、项目进展、操作日志等时序内容。

#### Class Names
- `timeline`
- `timeline-box`
- `timeline-start`
- `timeline-middle`
- `timeline-end`
- `timeline-vertical`
- `timeline-horizontal`
- `timeline-compact`
- `timeline-centered`
- `timeline-snap-icon`
- `timeline-shift`

#### Syntax
```html
<ul class="timeline timeline-vertical">
  <li>
    <div class="timeline-start">2024-01</div>
    <div class="timeline-middle">●</div>
    <div class="timeline-end timeline-box">项目启动</div>
  </li>
  <li>
    <div class="timeline-start">2024-06</div>
    <div class="timeline-middle">●</div>
    <div class="timeline-end timeline-box">版本发布</div>
  </li>
</ul>
```

---

### toast
消息通知组件。

[toast docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/toast)

**Usage:** 操作反馈通知，如保存成功、错误提示，短暂显示后消失。

#### Class Names
- `toast`
- `toast-title`
- `toast-message`
- `toast-close`
- `toast-info`
- `toast-success`
- `toast-warning`
- `toast-error`
- `toast-bordered`
- `toast-sm`
- `toast-lg`
- `toast-no-icon`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="toast toast-success">
  <div class="toast-title">操作成功</div>
  <div class="toast-message">数据已保存。</div>
  <button class="toast-close">✕</button>
</div>
```

---

### toggle
切换开关组件。

[toggle docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/toggle)

**Usage:** 设置项的启用/禁用开关。

#### Class Names
- `toggle`
- `toggle-primary`
- `toggle-secondary`
- `toggle-accent`
- `toggle-success`
- `toggle-warning`
- `toggle-error`
- `toggle-info`
- `toggle-xs`
- `toggle-sm`
- `toggle-md`
- `toggle-lg`
- `toggle-xl`

#### Syntax
```html
<input type="checkbox" class="toggle toggle-primary" />
<input type="checkbox" class="toggle toggle-success toggle-lg" checked />
```

---

### tooltip
提示气泡（纯 CSS）。

[tooltip docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/tooltip)

**Usage:** 鼠标悬停时显示简短说明，通过 `data-tip` 属性设置内容。

#### Class Names
- `tooltip`
- `tooltip-open`
- `tooltip-bottom`
- `tooltip-left`
- `tooltip-right`
- `tooltip-primary`
- `tooltip-secondary`
- `tooltip-accent`
- `tooltip-info`
- `tooltip-success`
- `tooltip-warning`
- `tooltip-error`
- `tooltip-no-arrow`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="tooltip" data-tip="这是提示内容">
  <button class="btn">悬停我</button>
</div>

<div class="tooltip tooltip-bottom tooltip-primary" data-tip="底部主色提示">
  <button class="btn btn-primary">按钮</button>
</div>
```

---

### validation
表单验证状态样式。

[validation docs](https://yami.yuelili.com/validation)

**Usage:** 为表单字段添加验证通过/失败的视觉反馈。

#### Class Names
- `validate`
- `is-valid`
- `is-invalid`
- `success-message`
- `error-message`
- `helper-text`

#### Syntax
```html
<div class="validate is-invalid">
  <input type="text" class="input" value="wrong" />
  <span class="error-message">格式不正确</span>
</div>

<div class="validate is-valid">
  <input type="text" class="input" value="correct" />
  <span class="success-message">验证通过</span>
</div>
```

---

## Themes

通过 `data-theme` 属性切换，使用 OKLCH 颜色空间：

`light` `dark` `apple` `github` `discord` `figma` `linear` `notion-light` `notion-dark` `slack-light` `slack-dark` `spotify-light` `spotify-dark` `stripe-light` `stripe-dark` `vercel` `x` `vscode` `airbnb` `material` `claude`

```html
<html data-theme="dark">
<div data-theme="github">局部主题</div>
```

---

## JS Plugins

```ts
import { Modal, initModals } from "@yuelioi/yami/plugins/modal"
import { Dropdown, initDropdowns } from "@yuelioi/yami/plugins/dropdown"
import { Popover, initPopovers } from "@yuelioi/yami/plugins/popover"
import { Sidebar, initSidebars } from "@yuelioi/yami/plugins/sidebar"
```
